calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Kirk B. Freeman, an individual was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant David Ito, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on May 27, 2010. Amended default was entered against defendant on June 29, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 29, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Kirk B. Freeman, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendant David Ito, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $64,175.86.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,458.71.
Costs - $445.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $66,079.57.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Continued To Aug-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
